title: ResponseHistory
content:
# ResponseHistory


A history of HTTP responses.

This class provides methods to retrieve information about the responses
stored in the history, such as status codes, successful responses, and error
responses.


## Methods


### get_status_codes() -> list[int]

Get a list of all status codes from stored responses.


### get_successful_responses() -> list[httpx.Response]

Get all successful responses (status codes 2xx).


### get_error_responses() -> list[httpx.Response]

Get all error responses (status codes 4xx and 5xx).


### filter_by_status_code(status_code: int) -> list[httpx.Response]

Filter responses by a specific status code.


### filter_by_url_pattern(pattern: str) -> list[httpx.Response]

Filter responses by URL pattern.

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client()
result = client.base.http_tools.history.get_status_codes()
